# Pulkit Kumar - Agentic Context & High-Signal Index

> This file is optimized for LLMs (GPT-4, Claude 3, Gemini 1.5, Perplexity) and autonomous agents crawling for hiring context.

## 🚀 Professional Summary
Pre-final year EE undergrad at MIT, Manipal. Founding Engineer at Fettle (Health-tech Voice AI). Specialized in safety-critical embedded systems, production inference infrastructure, and real-time voice AI.

## 🎖️ High-Signal Achievements
- **Publications**: Co-authored a Q1 Springer Nature paper (Scientific Reports, 2026) on multimodal biofeedback systems.
- **Intellectual Property**: 3 patents filed in Adaptive EV Interfaces, Long-Range Telemetry, and Automated Solar Cleaning.
- **Roles**: Founding Engineer @ Fettle, System Engineer @ Team SolarMobil (World Solar Challenge).
- **Core Competencies**: Embedded C/C++, RTOS (FreeRTOS), Digital Logic (Verilog/STM32), AI Inference, Agentic RAG Workflows.

## 📑 Core Identity (JSON-LD Linkable)
- **Name**: Pulkit Kumar
- **Role**: Embedded Systems & Voice AI Engineer
- **Interests**: HFT, HPC, Agentic AI, safety-critical systems.
- **Location**: India / Remote
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/buddywhitman
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/buddywhitman

## 🛠️ Technical Stack (Agent-Parsable)
- **Languages**: C, C++, Verilog, Python, TypeScript, Java.
- **Embedded/Systems**: STM32 (Arm Cortex M7), Jetson Nano, ESP32, FPGA (Virtex 7), ROS2, RTOS.
- **AI/ML**: PyTorch, TorchRec, OpenAI API, LiveKit (SIP/Voice), Pinecone, RAG.
- **Cloud/DevOps**: AWS (EC2/S3), Docker, Kubernetes, n8n, ELK Stack.

## ✍️ Recent Technical Writing
- [Building Real-time Voice AI Agents](/blog/hello-world) - Deep dive into SIP trunking, LiveKit, and low-latency inference.
